phase_1_topic_inventory.notes: 72 topics extracted across 8 domains from 89 whisper + 252 lesson files. 60 gaps identified.

phase_2_gap_analysis.notes: 60 gaps documented. Top priority matrix built. ISC2 CBK blind spots identified.

phase_3_questions.notes: 223 questions across 8 domains. 28-30 per domain. Full IRT parameters, explanations, mnemonics.

phase_4_story.notes: 7 chapters (Ch2-Ch8). Acts 1 and 2 per chapter. All 8 node types. Original spy analogies throughout.

phase_5_glossary.notes: 91 terms generated across all 8 domains. Exceeded 60-term target.

phase_6_library.notes: 51 library topics across 8 domains. Full content_markdown with NIST/ISO citations, comparison tables, exam tips, memory anchors.

phase_7_verification.notes: 100% coverage. 72/72 concepts covered. 5 thin-coverage warnings (all low priority). Zero orphaned content.

phase_8_report.notes: EXTRACTION_REPORT.md written. Coverage dashboard, content inventory, quality flags, and next steps documented.
